archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Authority and Premium Fintech
design_vision: Elegant, professional, minimalist, and trustworthy. We avoid the 'sleazy car salesman' trope by adopting a premium, high-contrast fintech aesthetic. The interface acts as a transparent, authoritative consultant.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0A192F]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#0A192F]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous breathing room. The design must feel expansive and unhurried to communicate luxury and trust.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A192F] text-white hover:bg-[#0F294D] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A192F] text-[#0A192F] hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.whatsapp_sticky: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center

cards.service: bg-white p-8 border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-slate-200/50 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-start
cards.product: bg-white border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-slate-50 border-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A192F] rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-base text-[#0A192F]

labels.ready_stock: absolute top-4 left-4 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm text-[#0A192F] text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 uppercase tracking-wider shadow-sm

landing_page.description: Full height or 80vh layout. High-res vehicle image taking up 50-60% of the screen. Left side: massive headline 'Solusi Kendaraan Bekas & Pendanaan Terpercaya di Balikpapan & Handil', sub-headline, and two CTAs (Cari Kendaraan, Konsultasi BPKB). Dark Navy text on a crisp white/silver-tinted background.
3-column bento grid detailing 'Beli Kendaraan', 'Jual & Tukar Tambah', and 'Gadai BPKB'. Minimalist icons (Phosphor icons recommended).
Grid of top vehicles. Each product card has a high-quality image, title, specs (Year, Mileage), price, and a 'Tanya via WhatsApp' CTA button. Includes 'Unit Ready - Balikpapan' label.
Side-by-side layout. Image of a professional consultant handshake. Text explaining the broker/consultant model: safe, transparent, and direct to showroom.

gadai_bpkb_page.description: Dedicated landing page for cash loans.
features: Hero explaining fast liquidations and low interest
Interactive Loan Calculator (Simulasi Pinjaman) using Shadcn Forms/Sliders
Lead capture form connected to WhatsApp

admin_panel.description: Simple protected dashboard for managing vehicle inventory.
features: Add/Edit/Delete forms with fields for title, category (mobil/motor), price, year, mileage, and image URL

interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have a clear hover state. Buttons shift background color, cards elevate slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a soft ambient shadow.
interactions.page_transitions: Fade-in entrance for major sections using Framer Motion (opacity: 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0).

media_and_assets.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react with thin/light weights for a premium feel.

images.description: Silver premium sports car indoors, perfect for the hero section background or side-image.
Two professionals shaking hands across a table. Use in the Trust Builder section.
Silver car parked outside. Use as a sample product in the catalog.
Motorcycle parked. Use as a sample product in the catalog.

testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='cta-whatsapp-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No generic blue; use the specified Navy and Gold hex codes.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Install and use 'Cabinet Grotesk' or fallback to a similar premium Sans/Display font.
Ensure the layout is highly optimized for mobile (mobile-first), as traffic comes from Meta Ads.
Build the Gadai BPKB Loan Simulator as an interactive client component with Shadcn sliders.
Implement the Sticky WhatsApp CTA globally.
For the admin panel, use pure Shadcn Table and Form components. Keep it secure but simple.
